instructions: Lift the pot off the counter using both hands.
Use both grippers to pick up the kitchen pot and raise it.
Grasp the pot with your left and right hands, then lift it upward.
Bimanually lift the pot from the counter without tilting it.
Pick up the pot using both arms and hold it above the surface.
Grab the kitchen pot with both end-effectors and lift it clear of the cabinet.
Raise the pot from the counter using a two-handed grip.
Carefully lift the pot with both hands, keeping it level.
Using both grippers, lift the cooking pot up from the workspace.
Grip the pot on both sides and elevate it above the counter.
